name: Portion Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool for calculating the true cost per portion of a product or recipe, incorporating material, labor, overhead, waste, and yield losses. Aligned with ISO 9001, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC cost-to-serve standards.

inputs.label: Raw Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Purchase price of the primary ingredient per kilogram, sourced from supplier invoice or ERP.

businessContext_i18n.en: Purchase price of the primary ingredient per kilogram, sourced from supplier invoice or ERP.

inputs.label: Portion Weight
inputs.businessContext: Target weight of one finished portion as specified in the recipe or product spec.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target weight of one finished portion as specified in the recipe or product spec.

inputs.label: Yield Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Usable output after processing (trimming, cooking, etc.). Measured via Six Sigma process capability studies.

businessContext_i18n.en: Usable output after processing (trimming, cooking, etc.). Measured via Six Sigma process capability studies.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened labor rate including wages, benefits, and payroll taxes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened labor rate including wages, benefits, and payroll taxes.

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor time to produce one batch of the product.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct labor time to produce one batch of the product.

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of portions produced per batch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of portions produced per batch.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Allocated overhead (utilities, rent, equipment depreciation) as a percentage of direct material and labor costs. Based on WERC cost-to-serve model.

businessContext_i18n.en: Allocated overhead (utilities, rent, equipment depreciation) as a percentage of direct material and labor costs. Based on WERC cost-to-serve model.

inputs.label: Waste Disposal Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost to dispose of trimmings and waste, including hauling and landfill fees.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to dispose of trimmings and waste, including hauling and landfill fees.

inputs.label: Trim Loss Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of raw material lost during trimming or preparation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of raw material lost during trimming or preparation.

inputs.label: Currency
inputs.businessContext: Currency for all monetary inputs and outputs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Currency for all monetary inputs and outputs.

rules.message: Yield percentage plus trim loss percentage must not exceed 100%.
Batch size must be greater than zero.
Portion weight must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Portion cost exceeds $2.00 — investigate material or yield improvements.
Yield below 75% — consider Lean Six Sigma process improvement.
Labor cost is more than 50% of total portion cost — review automation or efficiency.

formulas.label: Effective Raw Material Cost per kg
formulas.description: Adjusts raw material cost for trim loss and waste disposal.

formulas.label: Material Cost per Portion
formulas.description: Cost of raw material in one portion after accounting for yield loss.

formulas.label: Labor Cost per Portion
formulas.description: Direct labor cost allocated to one portion.

formulas.label: Direct Cost per Portion
formulas.description: Sum of material and labor costs per portion.

formulas.label: Overhead Cost per Portion
formulas.description: Allocated overhead based on direct cost.

formulas.label: Total Cost per Portion (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Fully loaded cost per portion including material, labor, and overhead.

primary.label: Total Cost per Portion
primary.description: Fully loaded cost per portion, the primary result of the calculator.

effective_raw_material_cost.label: Effective Raw Material Cost per kg

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Trim Loss Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Additional cost due to trim loss, calculated as (raw_material_cost_per_unit * trim_loss_percentage/100) per kg.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Yield Loss Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost of material lost due to yield percentage less than 100%.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Waste Disposal Hidden Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost of disposing trim waste, often overlooked in standard costing.

suggestedActions.action: Implement Lean Six Sigma DMAIC project to improve yield by reducing process variation.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduce material cost per portion by up to 10%.

suggestedActions.action: Review trimming specifications and consider alternative cutting patterns or supplier pre-trimming.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduce effective raw material cost by 5-15%.

suggestedActions.action: Conduct time-motion study to identify non-value-added activities; consider automation.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduce labor cost per portion by 20%.

suggestedActions.action: Negotiate volume discounts or explore alternative suppliers to lower material cost.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Cost
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Total cost per portion adjusted for data quality and variability using a confidence factor (0.8 to 1.2). Based on input variability and historical accuracy.
